query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CIV_CA_UNJUST_ENRICHMENT', 'Unjust Enrichment / Restitution', 'civil', 'CA', 'Equitable', 'common_law', NULL, 'Often pleaded as quasi-contract / restitution theory.', 'restitution,equity,quasi-contract'),
('CIV_CA_QUANTUM_MERUIT', 'Quantum Meruit', 'civil', 'CA', 'Equitable', 'common_law', NULL, 'Reasonable value of services.', 'services,restitution'),
('CIV_CA_CONVERSION', 'Conversion', 'civil', 'CA', 'Property / Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Wrongful dominion over personal property.', 'property,tort'),
('CIV_CA_TRESPASS_TO_CHATTELS', 'Trespass to Chattels', 'civil', 'CA', 'Property / Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Interference with personal property.', 'property,tort'),
('CIV_CA_BREACH_CONTRACT', 'Breach of Contract', 'civil', 'CA', 'Contract', 'common_law', NULL, 'Contract formation + breach + damages.', 'contract,commercial'),
('CIV_CA_BREACH_IMPLIED_COVENANT', 'Breach of Implied Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing', 'civil', 'CA', 'Contract', 'common_law', NULL, 'Typically tied to an underlying contract.', 'contract,good-faith'),
('CIV_CA_PROMISSORY_ESTOPPEL', 'Promissory Estoppel', 'civil', 'CA', 'Contract / Equitable', 'common_law', NULL, 'Promise + reliance + injustice.', 'reliance,equity');
